generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder reading crane swing angle, acquired by Arduino"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed, acquired by Arduino"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorControllerFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Status feedback (positions, currents) from motor controllers read by Arduino"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorControllerDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Swing angle data transmitted via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Wind speed data transmitted via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance MotorControllerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Motor position and current data transmitted via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorControllerFeedbackSensor
]

// C10: Data (time‑series sensor data)
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series swing angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series wind speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance MotorControllerData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series motor position and current data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorControllerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

// C10: Models
instance CAD3DModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD 3‑D models of the crane created in Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GrafanaDashboardEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by the Trajectory Generator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntimeEnabler
]

instance DynamicSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model of the crane and its controllers used by the Simulation Service"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntimeEnabler
]

instance ContinuousValidationComparisonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Continuous‑validation comparison data model for metric comparison and threshold alerting"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntimeEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB PostgreSQL extension storing time‑series sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance PythonRuntimeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python runtime environment executing gantrylib services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService,
                      CraneSimulationService,
                      ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana platform visualising performance trends"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaVisualizationDashboard
]

instance MosquittoBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for messaging"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance GantryLibAPIEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "gantrylib Python module providing API access to models and services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService,
                      TrajectoryGeneratorService,
                      CraneSimulationService,
                      ContinuousValidationService,
                      HumanMachineInterfaceService
]

instance DockerComposeOrchestratorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker‑compose orchestrator managing container deployment on a single host"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService,
                      GrafanaVisualizationDashboard,
                      TrajectoryGeneratorService,
                      CraneSimulationService,
                      ContinuousValidationService,
                      HumanMachineInterfaceService,
                      MQTTBrokerService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs sensor data received via MQTT into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataStoredInsight
]

instance GrafanaVisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides Grafana dashboards for performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceTrendInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal motion plans using the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalMotionPlanInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runs dynamic simulation of crane behavior using the simulation model"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously validates metrics against comparison data, issuing alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight,
                      DiagnosticMetricsInsight
]

instance HumanMachineInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "HMI allowing operator control and displaying real‑time status via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorControlAction
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT broker enabling message exchange between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:provides MessagingInfrastructureInsight
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance SensorDataStoredInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirms sensor data has been stored in TimescaleDB"
]

instance PerformanceTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Shows performance trends enabling analysis and maintenance decisions"
]

instance OptimalMotionPlanInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides optimal trajectory for crane movement"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Delivers simulated crane dynamics for evaluation"
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Raises alerts when validation metrics exceed thresholds"
]

instance DiagnosticMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Supplies diagnostic metrics for fault detection"
]

instance OperatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator can adjust control parameters via the HMI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MessagingInfrastructureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensures reliable MQTT message delivery between components"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Trajectory and control set‑points generated by the Trajectory Generator Service (and the Control Application) are sent over MQTT to the Physical Crane Interface, which forwards them to the motor controllers and Arduino to drive the cart, hoist and electromagnet; manual commands from the Human‑Machine Interface follow the same path."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A cyber‑physical system where the physical crane is linked via a Python interface to a set of digital services (MQTT broker, TimescaleDB, Grafana dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service) and an operator HMI; all services communicate through MQTT and the shared database, forming a tightly coupled digital twin constellation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin spans the design stage (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360), the manufacturing/assembly stage (physical crane built from the bill‑of‑materials), and the operation stage (runtime services for control, logging, simulation and validation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service continuously compares measured trajectories with simulated trajectories, computes distance metrics, checks against a predefined threshold, and raises alerts on the dashboard when the threshold is exceeded, thereby providing runtime fidelity assessment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between PT and DT uses MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) for command and telemetry messages, and SQL over TCP/IP for TimescaleDB access. The Physical Crane Interface runs a Python program that connects to the motor controllers via serial/USB and publishes/subscribes to MQTT topics."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital twin components are hosted on a personal computer; Docker containers run the database, MQTT broker and Grafana dashboard, while the remaining Python services run as processes. Deployment is automated with a Docker‑compose file provided in the repository."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture is described using the C4 model (context and container diagrams) as a standardized visual notation; the digital twin uses open standards such as MQTT and SQL, but no formal industry standards are cited."
]
